protein_name: Probably functions as an alternative splicing regulator. May regulate the mRNA splicing of genes such as CLK1. May act by regulating members of the CLK kinase family. Belongs to the splicing factor SR family. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
